overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, gothic stone architecture, and students dining at long tables. Ghostly apparitions appear and move through the hall during the latter part of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera observing the dining hall and students below from a balcony position

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in the air providing warm golden illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows showing dark blue night sky outside
medieval stone columns and arches along the left wall with tapestries hanging between them
large stone fireplace structure with active fire burning on the right side of the hall
rows of long wooden dining tables filled with students eating and conversing

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a vast gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden dining tables below, while warm firelight glows from a large hearth on the right and cool blue light filters through tall stained-glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers

events.description: translucent ghostly figures materialize near the fireplace and begin walking through the dining hall

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary observation as ghostly figures traverse the hall from right to left

notable_agents.action: translucent white ghostly figure walking from the fireplace area toward the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: Ghostly apparitions appear near the fireplace and move through the hall, passing between the dining tables. The students remain seated and the atmospheric lighting from the floating candles continues to illuminate the scene as the spirits traverse from right to left across the marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady elevated perspective of a gothic great hall that transforms from a serene dining scene into a space haunted by ethereal spirits. It begins with a wide view of students seated at long wooden tables, illuminated by the glow of hundreds of floating candles and the contrast between warm hearth fire and cool blue light from stained-glass windows. As the camera holds its position, ghostly apparitions begin to manifest near the fireplace, introducing a supernatural element to the atmosphere. The scene then shifts as these spirits glide across the marble floor, weaving between the dining tables and moving from right to left through the hall. Finally, the spirits traverse the vast space while the students remain seated under the constant, flickering light of the floating candles.
